extension.summary: Stream Cinema movies and series sorted by CSFD rating
Filmy a serialy zo Stream Cinema zoradene podla CSFD
Filmy a serialy ze Stream Cinema serazene podle CSFD
extension.description: Loads new and recently added Stream Cinema movies and series, matches them against CSFD, enriches them with rating, votes, plot and reviews, then sorts the list in a CSFD-style order with cached widget results for faster home loading.

Nacita novinky a najnovsie pridane filmy a serialy zo Stream Cinema, sparuje ich s CSFD, doplni hodnotenie, hlasy, obsah a recenzie a potom ich zoradi v style CSFD. Pre home widgety pouziva vyslednu disk cache, aby sa nacitali rychlejsie.

Nacte novinky a nejnoveji pridane filmy a serialy ze Stream Cinema, sparuje je s CSFD, doplni hodnoceni, hlasy, obsah a recenze a potom je seradi ve stylu CSFD. Pro home widgety pouziva vyslednou disk cache, aby se nacitaly rychleji.
extension.news: v1.2.3 (2026-04-08) - Startup prewarm now stays disabled automatically when skin.kolop.lite is the active skin - This keeps the full and lite Kolop stacks from warming in parallel on the same Kodi boot v1.2.2 (2026-04-07) - Corrected movie widget mapping so Novinky use the original Stream Cinema latest feed and Novinky dabovane use the original latestd feed - Kept the dubbed movie feed prewarmed for skin.kolop while removing it from the addon root menu v1.2.1 (2026-04-07) - Added a dedicated dubbed movie releases source sorted through CSFD for skin.kolop home widgets - Prewarm now covers dubbed movie news so the extra row is ready sooner after Kodi startup v1.2.0 (2026-04-07) - Added Android-friendly startup prewarm and retry handling so Kolop widgets recover on cold Kodi boots - Added CSFD-based Tips of the Day sources for movies and series - Kept widget caches warm in the background through a Kodi service entry point v1.1.2 (2026-04-07) - Reduced Kolop widget fallback and detail cache retention from 3 days to 20 hours - Kept CSFD-driven home ordering while shortening stale widget lifetime v1.1.1 (2026-04-07) - Home widgets in skin.kolop now expose 25 items and keep last watched sections for SC movies and series - Switched JSON cache writes to an atomic temp-file replace flow to avoid corrupted detail/search cache files - Replaced fragile strptime date parsing so the recent-series widget works reliably on Kodi runtime v1.1.0 (2026-04-07) - Added movie and series sources for new and recently added Stream Cinema content - Added cached widget payloads for faster home loading - Added dedicated skin.kolop integration and improved metadata for repository publishing v1.0.1 (2026-04-06) - Switched CSFD requests to a safer header strategy that avoids the current anti-bot challenge in normal flow - Removed shared HTTP session usage across worker threads - Serialized cache updates for parallel CSFD search/detail enrichment
